summary: Iteration 58: Sora 2 Video Generation integration tested. Backend APIs all pass (11/11 tests). Fixed missing Sparkles import in VirtualReality.js. Frontend video toggle buttons verified in both Creation Stories cinema mode and VR Theater overlay. Navigation (search, mega-menus, Sage link) working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 58 complete. Sora 2 Video Generation integration verified: (1) Backend POST /api/ai-visuals/generate-video returns queued/generating/complete status with job_id. (2) Backend GET /api/ai-visuals/video-status/{job_id} returns correct status. (3) Backend GET /api/ai-visuals/video-stories returns 15 stories with has_video boolean. (4) Static files served at /api/static/videos/ path (returns 404 for missing files as expected). (5) Frontend Creation Stories page loads with 15 stories. (6) Cinema mode opens when clicking 'Watch AI Cinematic Experience' button. (7) Video toggle button visible in cinema mode top-right (data-testid='toggle-video-mode'). (8) VR page loads with portal grid and Theater picker. (9) Theater picker shows 6 creation stories. (10) Theater overlay shows Video toggle button in controls bar (data-testid='vr-theater-video-toggle'). (11) Navigation working: Practice mega-menu, Sage link to /coach. Fixed bug: Added missing 'Sparkles' import to VirtualReality.js lucide-react imports.

backend_api.POST /api/ai-visuals/generate-video with: PASS - returns status queued/generating/complete with job_id
backend_api.GET /api/ai-visuals/video-status/{job_id: PASS - returns status for valid job
